name: the review queue routes a whole directory of drafts into the three queues
command: mkdir -p drafts && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/draft-custom-rule.sh" --rule-id g-a --tool eslint --prose 'Never use var.' --json > drafts/a.json 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/draft-custom-rule.sh" --rule-id g-b --tool semgrep --prose 'Tenants must be isolated across regions.' --json > drafts/b.json 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/review-queue.sh" --dir drafts 2>e.txt; grep -q 'total=2' e.txt && echo routed-dir 1>&2
